criteria.description: Hands-on experience with Cypress for testing web applications built with React

criteria.description: Excellent communication skills in English for collaborating with an international, remote team

criteria.description: Collaborate closely with Product Owners, Developers, QA, and stakeholders; comfortable working directly with international teams within the Amsterdam/Europe time zone overlap
